report_name: Kodak Confirms Data Breach After ShinyHunters Threatens to Leak 2.2M Records

threat_actors.name: ShinyHunters
threat_actors.description: A prolific extortion group that claimed responsibility for the Kodak data breach, exfiltrating an alleged 2.2 million records and threatening to leak them if their demands were not met. The group specializes in large-scale data theft and extortion, rather than ransomware.
threat_actors.goals: Data theft and extortion for financial gain.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: The threat actor exfiltrated an alleged 2.2 million records containing customer PII and internal corporate data to their own infrastructure as part of their extortion scheme.

identities.name: Eastman Kodak Company
identities.description: Victim of a data breach claimed by the ShinyHunters extortion group, resulting in the alleged theft of 2.2 million records of customer PII and internal data.

infrastructure.name: ShinyHunters Dark Web Leak Site
infrastructure.description: A site on the dark web where ShinyHunters lists its victims and threatens to publish stolen data, as was done with Kodak.

indicators.name: Anomalous Salesforce Query API Usage for Mass Data Extraction
indicators.pattern:
title: Anomalous Salesforce Query API Usage for Mass Data Extraction
id: 7c5b9f8a-1e2d-4b3c-8a9f-0123456789ab
status: experimental
description: >
  Detects usage of the Salesforce query API endpoint. While this is legitimate traffic, a high volume of queries from a single source or outside of business hours can indicate mass data extraction attempts, a TTP associated with groups like ShinyHunters. This rule is intended for hunting and requires correlation or thresholding.
references:
  - https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/kodak-confirms-data-breach-claimed-by-shinyhunters-extortion-gang/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-18
tags:
  - attack.t1530
  - attack.collection
level: low
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  selection:
    cs-uri-stem|startswith: '/services/data/'
    cs-uri-stem|endswith: '/query'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects usage of the Salesforce query API endpoint, which can be used for mass data extraction. This is a known TTP of groups like ShinyHunters.

relationships.source_name: Anomalous Salesforce Query API Usage for Mass Data Extraction
